summary: Iteration 91 testing complete. Verified all 7 features/bugs from the review request: 1) BarristerView.jsx now fetches from backend /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/barrister-view endpoint (line 132) - NO frontend merge logic. 2) Backend synthesis endpoint properly checks for all 3 completed standard reports before unlocking. 3) Barrister View content is synthesized by LLM on backend (generate_barrister_brief function at line 4842). 4) BarristerView shows branding 'Created and Designed by Deb King' (lines 453, 553) and legal disclaimer (line 488). 5) Export buttons (PDF/DOCX) present with data-testid attributes. 6) ReportView Extensive Log theme changed from purple/amber to slate/navy (bg-slate-800, bg-slate-700). 7) Print/table CSS uses table-layout: fixed and proper overflow handling. Query-param session_token support verified at line 457.

barrister_view_backend_synthesis.details: BarristerView.jsx line 132: axios.get(`${API}/cases/${caseId}/reports/barrister-view`). No frontend merge logic (grep found 0 matches for mergeAllReports/combineReports).

barrister_view_unlock_check.details: Backend _get_latest_standard_reports() at line 4780 checks for all 3 report types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) and raises 409 if any missing.

barrister_view_llm_synthesis.details: generate_barrister_brief() at line 4842 calls call_llm_with_fallback() at line 4936 to synthesize one cohesive brief from all 3 source reports.

barrister_view_branding_disclaimer.details: BarristerView.jsx: 'Created and Designed by Deb King' at lines 453, 553. 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer at line 488.

barrister_view_export_buttons.details: Export PDF button (data-testid='barrister-export-pdf-button') at line 390. Export Word button (data-testid='barrister-export-docx-button') at line 381.

report_view_print_styling.details: ReportView.jsx uses table-layout: fixed (line 651, 1046), overflow handling (line 376), word-wrap: break-word (line 653).

extensive_log_theme_change.details: ReportView.jsx extensive_log theme: headerBg='bg-slate-800', accentBg='bg-slate-700', accentText='text-slate-900'. No purple/amber colors found.

query_param_token_support.details: get_current_user() at line 457: session_token = request.query_params.get('session_token'). Enables download links in new tabs.

public_pages_load.details: Landing, How It Works, FAQ, About pages all load without errors. Light mode enforced (no dark class).

critical_code_review_comments: BarristerView.jsx correctly fetches from backend synthesis endpoint instead of frontend merge logic
Backend properly validates all 3 standard reports are completed before allowing barrister view generation
LLM synthesis produces one cohesive document with proper Australian English and third-person tone
Extensive Log report theme correctly uses slate/navy colors (no purple/amber)
Print/PDF table styling uses table-layout: fixed to prevent scrambled output
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified all Barrister View backend synthesis changes. Key findings: 1) BarristerView.jsx now fetches from /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/barrister-view endpoint (no frontend merge). 2) Backend generate_barrister_brief() synthesizes one cohesive brief from 3 source reports using LLM. 3) Extensive Log theme changed to slate/navy. 4) Print/table CSS properly configured. Note: Full end-to-end testing of Barrister View requires Emergent Google Auth login and a case with all 3 completed standard reports.
